_comment: Per-table writer-role expectations. WRITE policies (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, FOR ALL) on each listed table must collectively allow exactly the role set declared under `writers.default`. Tables with status-aware splits also declare `writers.lock_transitions` plus the column + values that gate them. The accompanying test (tests/security/role-write-matrix.test.ts) parses the migrations and fails CI if a write policy diverges from this manifest, or if a `schedule_payroll_*` write policy exists for a table not declared here. Add new payroll tables here when introduced; the test forces explicit declaration. Scheduling-table backfill is opportunistic and tracked separately — see CLAUDE.md S27a-fix scope notes.
